name: Hidden Treasures
recipeIngredient: 1 cup White melting chocolate, chopped into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (180°C).
2. Cream the Golden Crisco Shortening, sugar, Egg, Milk, and Vanilla extract in a large bowl at medium speed of an electric mixer until well blended.
3. Gradually add flour, baking powder, Salt, and Baking soda into the creamed mixture at low speed.
4. Press the dough into a very thin layer around the Maraschino cherries. Place them 2 inches (5 cm) apart on an ungreased baking sheet.
5. Bake in the preheated oven for 10 minutes. Allow to cool for one minute on the baking sheet before transferring to a cooling rack and allowing to cool completely.
6. Melt the chocolate of choice with Golden Crisco Shortening in the microwave on low heat or medium power. Stir until smooth.
7. Place the melted chocolate in a glass measuring cup. Dip each cookie individually into the chocolate, turning them gently. Allow excess chocolate to drip off before placing on wax paper-lined baking sheet.
8. Sprinkle chopped pecans over the white chocolate cookies and shaved white chocolate over the dark chocolate cookies while the chocolate is still wet. Refrigerate until set.
Tip: If the chocolate becomes too firm, reheat it on low heat to restore its consistency.
